title: 明日は私が勝つんだから！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I make my way to the track a little early for
morning training. As soon as I arrive...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, looks like I'm first again! Ah, it sure feels
good to be number one in everything! ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Okay, time to get changed! I'm going to run my
heart out today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet seems to be in a very good mood
as she prepares to train.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: You... you were here before me?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
No! I thought I was the first one to arrive! I can't
believe I'm second!
choice_data_list: Do you always come this early?
Do you always come this early?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
No! I thought I was the first one to arrive! I can't
believe I'm second!
choice_data_list: Do you always come this early?
Do you always come this early?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I suppose you could call me a morning
person. Although it seems you got the better of
me today.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
The morning is when I can concentrate the best. I
can run freely without worrying about others
watching me.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm always aiming to be number one. I want to be
the first to arrive at school and the runner who
completes the most laps.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
It's not the same! Being second place is out of the
question! It's first or nothing!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Getting here early just doesn't hit the same way if
I'm not number one! Ugh, I'm so, so, so ANGRY!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You won't be so lucky tomorrow! I'm gonna be
first to school for sure!
